# Memory Page Template

Use this template for pages under `project/memory/*`.
Keep each page focused on one kind of project memory and prefer updating existing entries over adding duplicates.

## Purpose
What kind of project memory belongs on this page?

## Current highlights
List the few highest-signal reminders first when that helps recovery.

## Include here
What should be captured on this page?

## Do not include here
What should stay out of this page?

## Entry format
Define the short repeated structure for entries on this page.
Prefer entries that answer:
- what is the repeated rule or pattern
- when does it matter
- what should the reader do
- where can they read more
